title: passiflora oblongata var. lyrifolia
intro: Passiflora oblongata var. lyrifolia, also known as the passionflower, is a perennial climbing plant native to South Africa, characterized by its distinctive and intricate flowers. The medicinal properties of Passiflora oblongata var. lyrifolia include its sedative, anti-anxiety, and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and alkaloids. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menopause and irritable bowel syndrome. Herbal preparations of Passiflora oblongata var. lyrifolia include teas, tinctures, and extracts, which can be used to make capsules or added to supplements to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
